summary: Hotel Kiosk Management System Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 20/20 API tests passed. Frontend: All 16 features verified. Super Admin can manage hotels (CRUD), view dashboard stats, see hotel details with kiosks/bookings, toggle status, and delete hotels.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> elements inside <tbody> and <select> - cosmetic but should be fixed for cleaner React code

dashboard.test_dashboard_returns_stats: PASS - Returns total_hotels, active_hotels, total_kiosks, kiosks_online, bookings_today, bookings_month, total_revenue, total_bookings, total_hotel_commissions, total_zont_commissions, monthly_revenue

hotels_list.test_hotels_have_enriched_stats: PASS - Each hotel has total_bookings, total_revenue, hotel_commission_total, zont_commission_total, kiosks_count, kiosks_online
hotels_list.test_hotels_have_required_fields: PASS - Each hotel has id, name, city, status, commission_rate, zont_commission_rate

hotel_crud.test_create_hotel: PASS - Creates hotel with all fields, auto-creates hotel_admin user
hotel_crud.test_get_hotel_detail: PASS - Returns hotel with kiosks array and recent_bookings array
hotel_crud.test_delete_hotel: PASS - Deletes hotel, returns 404 on subsequent GET

kiosks.test_list_all_kiosks: PASS - Returns kiosks with hotel_name enrichment

bookings.test_list_all_bookings: PASS - Returns bookings with hotel_name, hotel_commission, zont_commission, driver_amount calculated

frontend_tests.admin_login: PASS - Login as admin@zont.cab / admin123 works

sidebar_navigation.hotel_kiosk_section: PASS - 'HOTEL KIOSK' divider label visible in sidebar

hotels_dashboard_page.stat_cards: PASS - Shows 6 cards: Hotels (3), Bornes (4), Reservations mois (16), CA Total (5,415.37 EUR), Comm. Hotels (791.82 EUR), Revenus Zont (541.54 EUR)
hotels_dashboard_page.revenue_chart: PASS - 'Revenus mensuels' bar chart displays monthly revenue
hotels_dashboard_page.hotel_ranking_table: PASS - 'Classement Hotels' shows hotels sorted by revenue

hotels_manager_page.hotels_table: PASS - Shows columns: Hotel, Ville, Reservations, CA Total, Commission, Rev. Zont, Statut

hotel_form.form_opens: PASS - data-testid='hotel-form' appears on create button click
hotel_form.sections_present: PASS - Informations generales, Contact principal, Commission et configuration
hotel_form.form_submits: PASS - Hotel created successfully with toast 'Hotel cree'

hotel_actions_menu.view_option: PASS - 'Voir details' option present and works
hotel_actions_menu.delete_option: PASS - 'Supprimer' option works - hotel deleted with confirmation

hotel_detail_page.stat_cards: PASS - Shows Reservations, CA Total, Comm. Hotel, Comm. Zont
hotel_detail_page.contact_section: PASS - Shows contact name, phone, email, address
hotel_detail_page.commission_section: PASS - Shows Taux hotel, Taux Zont, Part chauffeur percentages
hotel_detail_page.kiosks_section: PASS - Shows kiosks when hotel has them (Bornes tactiles)

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in console - <span> wrapper elements inside <tbody>, <select> - caused by React rendering. Not affecting functionality but should be fixed for cleaner code.
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Commission calculations are mathematically correct (hotel_comm + zont_comm + driver_amount = total_price)
Demo data seeded with realistic bookings (15-30 per hotel)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded demo hotels (3 hotels with bookings). TEST_ hotels created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotel Kiosk Management System fully tested. All CRUD operations work. Dashboard shows stats, revenue chart, hotel ranking. Hotel detail shows contact, commission, kiosks, bookings. Toggle status and delete work. 3 demo hotels seeded: Le Bristol Paris (15%), Negresco Nice (12%), W Barcelona (18%). Note: React hydration warnings appear due to internal wrapper elements but don't affect functionality.

mocked_api.note: Hotel bookings are DEMO/SEEDED data, not connected to real C# backend. The booking data is generated randomly during seed and stored in MongoDB.
